name: novel-studio
description: NS is a local-file based multi-novel writing studio with brainstorming, research, memory, architecture, drafting, finishing, and illustration-prompt skills.

interface.shortDescription: Local-file based multi-novel writing studio for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Novel Studio helps Codex manage multi-novel workspaces with brainstorming, long-term memory, architecture, research, drafting, chapter audits, source logs, and illustration prompts.
defaultPrompt: 规划一个多小说创作工作区。
为这部小说建立本地长期记忆。
基于当前小说记忆写下一章。
